Naanga dhaan da
podian dhaan da
Aattam dhan da
Oorukulla king da

Pondicherry kadal oram
kondadalaam vaada machi vaa
Currency ku panjam illa
collara dhaan thooki vidu da.
Konjam kooda kavala illa
Thuli kooda bayamum illa
Friendsunga kooda ninna
pichidalaam da

Aadi paakalaam da
Adichi thookinaaka
sachin naama da

Naanga dhaan da
podian dhaan da
Aattam dhan da
Oorukulla king da dei

Kaasu irundha Venaa dhaadi da

Namma life one day match da
Indha nimisham pona poye pochu da

oru mannum venaam da
Friends mattum podhum
vera ponnum venaa da
Rocket venaam da
oru flightum venaam da
Naama vaanathila parakka
oru bottle podhum da

Yaaru vandhaalum summa nikkadhey
Kadavul vandhaalum kadaney ketpome
Yaaru vandhaalum summa nikkadhey
Yemaney vandhaalum yeguri adipome

Naanga dhaan da
podian dhaan da
Aattam dhan da
Oorukulla king da

Dei

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Naanga Podiyan?

The song conveys a sense of youthful exuberance and carefree living, celebrating friendship and fun.

What is the context of the song in the movie Pugazh?

This song is featured during a lively sequence that showcases the characters enjoying life and having a good time.

Who are the singers of Naanga Podiyan?

The song is sung by Anirudh Ravichander and Diwakar.

When was Naanga Podiyan released?

The song was released on August 12, 2015.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Naanga Podiyan, the vibrant energy of the song reflects the carefree spirit of youth, making it a perfect anthem for celebrations. The lyrics emphasize friendship and the joy of living life to the fullest. Set against the backdrop of Pugazh, this track encapsulates the fun and excitement of the characters' journey. With its catchy beats and lively vocals, it evokes feelings of happiness and enthusiasm, making it a favorite among party-goers.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Naanga Podiyan from Pugazh is an electrifying anthem that perfectly captures the spirit of youth and celebration. With Anirudh's vibrant vocals paired with Diwakar's dynamic energy, this track is sure to get you on your feet. Experience the infectious beats and catchy lyrics that make this song a must-listen for any party playlist!
stanzaMeanings: We are the ones who are going to shine, we are the ones who dance, we are the kings in this town.

Let's go to the beach in Pondicherry, come on buddy. There's no need to worry about money. Just lift your spirits a little. There's no fear, not even a little. We can have fun with friends. Life is a game, let's play it. If we hit hard, we are like Sachin.
We are the ones who are going to shine, we are the ones who dance, we are the kings in this town.
If there's money, it's fine. That beautiful world is your match. Our life is like a one-day match; this moment has already passed.
I don't want anything, I don't want a girl. Friends are enough, I don't need anything else. I don't want a rocket or a flight. Just a bottle is enough for us to fly in the sky.
Whoever comes, just stand still. Even if God comes, we will just listen. Whoever comes, just stand still. Even if a stranger comes, we will just enjoy.
We are the ones who are going to shine, we are the ones who dance, we are the kings in this town.

Let's go to the beach in Pondicherry, come on buddy. There's no need to worry about money. Just lift your spirits a little. There's no fear, not even a little. We can have fun with friends. Life is a game, let's play it. If we hit hard, we are like Sachin.
We are... shining... dancing... kings in this town... We are... shining... dancing... kings in this town... Hey...
